creator: no-reply@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to rkoberman from comment #27)

My problem is I use Poudriere to build my packages, and from what I get the symlink must be present on both build and run systems.

But why does uncommenting the OPENMP switch and adding

OPENMP_LDFLAGS+=        -L${LOCALBASE}/llvm60/lib

not work?
